name: Side Panel
description: The side panel allows the user to navigate the items of a table by viewing and editing the detail without leaving the current the page.

tokens.16/Bold: Font(family: "SF Pro Text", style: Bold, size: 16, weight: 700, lineHeight: 1.5, letterSpacing: 0)
tokens.14/Bold: Font(family: "SF Pro Text", style: Bold, size: 14, weight: 700, lineHeight: 1.25, letterSpacing: 0)
tokens.16/Semibold: Font(family: "SF Pro Text", style: Semibold, size: 16, weight: 600, lineHeight: 1.5, letterSpacing: 0)
tokens.Shadow/Popover: Effect(type: DROP_SHADOW, color: #27283329, offset: (0, 8), radius: 16, spread: 0)
